items.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
items.summary: The US Department of Energy says the "peaceful" co-operation agreement will give US firms "great access" to the Saudi nuclear energy programme.

items.title: Houthis claim attack on oil tankers as US launches more strikes on Iran
items.summary: The Houthi attacks would be the first in the Red Sea since the Iran-backed group announced a "maritime embargo" against Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Tankers make sharp U-turns after Houthi shipping threat
items.summary: All of the ships were travelling to or from Saudi ports before changing course, ship-tracking data shows.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 熱浪2週釀「超額死亡」暴增5764人 法國公衛署驚呆：前所未見
items.summary: 高溫熱浪上月席捲法國，氣溫一度突破40度，造成巴黎地區死亡人數爆增，最新統計顯示，6月中旬起熱浪席捲法國兩週的時間內，法國記錄了至少5764例超額死亡，比正常預期數字暴增36%。...…

items.title: 去年才血腥激戰！泰國蓋「防彈邊境牆」防柬埔寨再延7公里
items.summary: 泰國與柬埔寨去（2025）年因邊界主權爭議兩度駁火，造成近150人死亡、30萬人流離失所。儘管雙方達成停火協議，泰國仍持續強化邊境防禦，昨（22）日宣布已完成泰柬邊境首段長1.3...…

items.title: 中國洪災頻發災區慘況瘋傳！中共氣壞展開集中清理大抓人
items.summary: 中國近來頻傳天災，洪災尤其嚴重，災區滿目瘡痍的慘況在網路上瘋傳，而此事已引發官方關切。中共日前發出通知，將展開汛期災害事故「違法不良」資訊「集中清理整治」，調查有「移花接木」、「...…
